table.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 2px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

tr.td:
Expressions:
Enable When: (%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value <> 0) or (I.linkId = '8' and I.answer[0].value <> 0) ) and %resource.item I (where I.linkId = 'ageMonth' and I.answer[0].value > 24 )

tr.td:
Definition: code
Enable When:
Value Set: Visually assess for whether underweight (for drug dose calculation) Choices

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck00.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: previous weight populated age:validitiy fo weight in month <4:2,<6:3,>12:4,>59:6

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : left; background-color: white; border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

expression.value: iif (%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value <> 0), %resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value <> 0), iif (%resource.item I where (I.linkId = 'previousWeight' and I.answer[0].value <> 0),%resource.item I where (I.linkId = 'previousWeight' and I.answer[0].value <> 0), %resource.item I where (I.linkId = '8' and I.answer[0].value <> 0)))
iif(%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value>0) ,%resource.item I where I.linkId = '6',%resource.item I where I.linkId = 'previousWeight')

description.value: Temperature, Weight, NUAC and z-score measurement

expression.value: (%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value <> 12) -0.7 - wfh-mean ) div wfh-sd
(%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '6' and I.answer[0].value <> 0) or (I.linkId = '8' and I.answer[0].value <> 0) ) and %resource.item I (where I.linkId = 'ageMonth' and I.answer[0].value > 24 )

iif(%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '10' and I.answer[0].value = true),(%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '9' and I.answer[0].value = true))[0]answer[0].value,(%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '12' and I.answer[0].value = true))[0]answer[0].value - 0.7)
%resource.item I where (I.linkId = '12' and I.answer[0].value = true).answer[0].value - %qItem.wfl-mean ) div %qItem.wfl-sd

text.value: Visually assess for whether underweight (for drug dose calculation)
previous weight populated age:validitiy fo weight in month <4:2,<6:3,>12:4,>59:6
